input.testCaseTitle: Action button is not visible in role ProductHeadIndustrial and ProductHeadRetail in Product Workflow
input.stepLabel: Reproduce CPI-250 reported defect: Action button is not visible in role ProductHeadIndustrial and ProductHeadRetail in Product Workflow

groundTruth.rootCauseDetail: Product Head Retail and Product Head Industrial did not have the expected action button visibility in Product Workflow. The role-specific action visibility was corrected and verified in Dev.
groundTruth.notesForEval: Numeric confidence 0.82. ui-regression is acceptable because only screenshots are preserved for the symptom.
